title: BambooHR vs Rippling
description: Detailed comparison of BambooHR's dedicated HR management platform versus Rippling's unified HR, IT, and finance solution.

features.name: Employee Records
features.tool1Detail: Centralized employee profiles with custom fields
features.tool2Detail: Unified profile across HR, IT, and finance

features.name: Time Tracking
features.tool1Detail: Timesheets with PTO accrual and approvals
features.tool2Detail: Time clock with GPS and project tracking

features.name: Payroll Processing
features.tool2Detail: Native global payroll with auto tax filing

features.name: Applicant Tracking (ATS)
features.tool1Detail: Built-in ATS with job board posting

features.name: Onboarding Automation
features.tool1Detail: Digital offer letters and onboarding checklists

features.name: Offboarding
features.tool2Detail: Auto-revokes app access and locks devices

features.name: IT Management
features.tool2Detail: Unified IT inventory and policy management

features.name: Reporting & Analytics
features.tool1Detail: Custom HR reports and turnover analytics

verdict: BambooHR is a focused HR management platform with strong employee records, time tracking, applicant tracking, and performance management that excels for organizations that need dedicated HR tools without IT or finance overlap. Rippling offers a groundbreaking unified platform combining HR, global payroll, IT device management, and app provisioning into a single system that eliminates silos. Companies that want a simple, best-in-class HR system with performance reviews and ATS will prefer BambooHR. Organizations looking to automate the entire employee lifecycle from onboarding to offboarding across HR, IT, and finance will find Rippling's unified approach transformative.

faqs.question: Which is better for HR-only needs, BambooHR or Rippling?
faqs.answer: BambooHR is better for dedicated HR management, offering superior applicant tracking, performance reviews, and HR-specific reporting out of the box. Rippling's HR module covers core employee management but lacks the depth in ATS and performance management that BambooHR provides.

faqs.question: Can Rippling replace both BambooHR and an IT management tool?
faqs.answer: Yes, that is Rippling's primary value proposition. It replaces BambooHR for HR management and tools like Jamf or Intune for device management, plus adds app provisioning that neither provides. Businesses paying for separate HR and IT tools often save money by consolidating on Rippling.

faqs.question: Does BambooHR offer payroll natively?
faqs.answer: No, BambooHR does not have native payroll processing. It integrates with payroll providers like Gusto, ADP, and SurePayroll. Rippling includes native payroll with automated tax filing and supports global payroll in over 140 countries, making it a more complete solution.

faqs.question: Which platform has better reporting?
faqs.answer: BambooHR offers strong HR-specific reporting with turnover analysis, headcount trends, and custom HR metrics. Rippling provides unified reporting across HR, IT, and finance, giving leadership a cross-departmental view that BambooHR cannot match, but lacks some of BambooHR's HR-specific report types.

faqs.question: How do onboarding experiences compare?
faqs.answer: BambooHR provides excellent HR onboarding with digital offer letters, new hire packets, and training checklists. Rippling takes onboarding further by automatically creating accounts in every app the new hire needs (Slack, Google Workspace, GitHub, etc.) and shipping a pre-configured laptop, making the experience truly frictionless.
